categoryGrid.title: Bookings that feel effortless
categoryGrid.subtitle: Your website, calendar, walk-in display, and an AI voice agent — without marketplace commissions.

hero.title: Your business deserves its own booking system
hero.subtitle: Professional website + online bookings + AI agent that answers calls. All in one, no commissions.

items.title: Your own website
items.desc: Professional site with your logo, colors and custom domain. Your brand only.

items.title: 24/7 Bookings
items.desc: Clients book online anytime. You get automatic notifications.

items.title: AI Call Agent
items.desc: A voice agent answers calls, provides info and books appointments directly on your calendar.

items.title: Display screen
items.desc: Show the day's schedule in real time for your team and clients at your location.

items.title: Smart dashboard
items.desc: AI insights: frequent clients, peak hours, automatic reminders.

items.title: No commissions
items.desc: Unlike Booksy, we don't charge % per new client. They're yours.
